name_cn:
M47072 M47074
This Backup backpack is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin leather, subtly featuring a Monogram embossed pattern. The detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for both single-shoulder and backpack carrying, while the top handle and braided chain offer options for hand-carry or crossbody.
20 x 22 x 14 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
